context7-mcp.description: Real-time library documentation and code examples for AI coding
capabilities: Fetches current API references and docs
Supports Next.js, React, MongoDB, Supabase, and thousands more

usage.setup: Sign up at context7.com (free basic tier)
usage.auth: Add CONTEXT7_API_KEY env var for higher rate limits
usage.query: Ask about library documentation and it auto-queries
